title: Trump threatens Iran in final hours for deal
shortDescription: President Donald Trump sent a stark final warning to Iran ahead of a Tuesday evening deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump chats with Artemis II crew
shortDescription: After the Artemis II crew came back from the far side of the moon, the president gave them a call.

title: 'A whole civilization will die tonight' Trump says ahead of Iran deadline
shortDescription: The president has issued Iran a deadline of 8 p.m. ET on Tuesday to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Iran shows no signs of complying.

title: Dems hope blue wave floods Marjorie Taylor Greene's old seat
shortDescription: Georgia's 14th Congressional District leans heavily Republican, but Democrats have outperformed expectations all over the country since 2025.

title: Trump blasts reporter over war crimes question
shortDescription: When a New York Times reporter asked President Donald Trump about possible Geneva Conventions violations, the president lashed out.

title: Trump threatens 'complete demolition' in Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters on April 6 that all of Iran can be "taken out in one night, and that night might be tomorrow night."

title: Legal experts, Dems warn Trump's Iran threats could be war crimes
shortDescription: Trump said he's "not worried" about concerns from experts and lawmakers who say his threats to bomb Iranian infrastructure could be war crimes.

title: Scenes from the 2026 White House Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: Photos from the 2026 White House Easter Egg Roll, featuring 30,000 eggs with a patriotic twist.

title: Bunnies and bomb threats? A split screen at White House Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: Children in sundresses and bow ties pranced on the White House lawn as President Donald Trump addressed his threats to bomb Iranian power plants.

title: Who will step into Marjorie Taylor Greene's spotlight? Voters decide
shortDescription: Two candidates are competing to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia, but voters say the winner will not fill her giant political shoes.

title: President Trump endorses Steve Hilton for California governor
shortDescription: Donald Trump endorsed conservative commentator Steve Hilton for California governor in a race that has some Democrats worried.

title: Trump threatens jail, presses media for leaker
shortDescription: President Trump said his administration could jail those responsible for leaking information about the mission to rescue a downed U.S. airman in Iran.

title: White House hosts annual Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: Families gathered at the White House for the annual Easter Egg Roll as President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump marked Easter.

title: Watch live as President Trump hosts news conference on Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump will host a news conference to address the intense search-and-rescue effort following the crash of an F-15E Strike Eagle fighter.

title: See the best photos from the White House Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: Children and families gather on the South Lawn for the annual White House Easter Egg Roll, a springtime tradition filled with games and color.

title: Trump called Iranians 'animals' at Easter event
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said Iran’s proposal for a ceasefire was “significant” but “not good enough."

title: Supreme Court clears way for Trump DOJ to wipe out Steve Bannon's conviction
shortDescription: Bannon, now a host of a popular MAGA podcast, was convicted in 2022 for defying a subpoena from the House committee that investigated the Jan. 6, 2021 attack .

title: What’s new at the White House Easter egg roll? 150 live chicks
shortDescription: The White House Easter egg roll is back Monday with 40,000 eggs, live chicks and a patriotic theme. Here’s how to watch.

title: Daily Briefing: Trump's profanity-filled Easter post
shortDescription: President gives Iran until Tuesday to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Here is the news to know on Monday.

title: Trump says Iran faces 'complete demolition' if there's no deal: Updates
shortDescription: President Donald Trump on Monday repeated his threat to blow up Iranian infrastructure if the country fails to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
